name: avatar-vrm
description: 3D VRM avatar (VRoid-compatible) — 13 feelings, actions, lip sync, spring-bone physics. Bring your own .vrm: see vrm-models/README.md

models.name: Your VRM model
models.description: Any VRM 0.x/1.0 file dropped into vrm-models/ (models are not shipped — most VRoid Hub licenses forbid redistribution)
